title: APF post-generation defect review for critical artifacts
closure_reason: Post-generation defect review was implemented as a blocking, claim-level, evidence-bound APF layer and validated against representative critical/high-impact contracts.
limitations: The review corpus is bounded to five representative APF contract families rather than every descriptive APF document.
Semantic truth still depends on authoritative sources; the validator does not infer external truth.
Existing immutable APF artifact ZIPs were not rewritten.
